title: Es Gegant des Vedrà i altres rondaies
original_title: Es Gegant des Vedrà i altres rondaies
overview: Agnès is only ten years old and a great lover of reading. One fine day, she makes contact with the ghost of writer Joan Castelló Guasch, who tells her three Ibizan legends full of mystery and fantasy.
